name: xforge-testing
description: Padroes de testing .NET: xUnit, FluentAssertions, Moq, NSubstitute, Testcontainers, Bogus (auto-faker), arquitetura de testes, coverage, mutation testing.

knowledgeEntries.summary: Fact, Theory, InlineData, MemberData, ClassData, ICollectionFixture, IAsyncLifetime
Should().Be(), Should().BeEquivalentTo(), Should().Throw(), Should().Match(), assertions custom
Moq vs NSubstitute vs FakeItEasy, mocks vs stubs vs fakes, verify, callback
PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Kafka, Elasticsearch em Docker para tests de integracao
Faker<T>, RuleFor, locales (pt-BR), seed deterministic, custom fakers para entidades ERP
Coverlet, line vs branch vs mutation, what to cover, integration vs unit ratio

author: XForge Engineer
